title: Not Enough Enchantments
description: Adds new variety of enchantments to Minecraft
body:
**This mod adds new enchants in variety of ways. Right now mod adds 8 new enchants.**


<details>
<summary>Enchants 📕</summary>

- Reach - increases mining range
- Long Sword - increases entity hitting range
- Speedy - increases attack speed
- Floating - lowers gravity
- Anvil Falling - doubles fall damage 
- Bunny - increases jump height
- Curse of Breaking - tools have chance to insta break
- Magma Walker - Frost Walker, but with magma on lava


</details>




# Compability 🧱
- Only runs on Neoforge and in version 1.21.4 or 1.21.1
- Both server and client needs to have this mod installed

# Notes 📑
This mod is new so don't expect something big, but more enchants will be added overtime.
